description_long: This jersey barrier is a robust, elongated structure with a slightly tapered profile and a rough, concrete-like surface. The main body is a dark gray, with subtle textural variations and some visible surface imperfections, giving it a weathered, utilitarian appearance. The ends of the barrier feature vertical metal reinforcement strips, each fastened with bolts, adding to its industrial look and structural integrity. The base of the barrier has notches or cutouts, likely for stability or ease of placement with machinery. There are no visible reflective strips, painted markings, or warning signs on its surface. The overall design is functional, intended to serve as a physical barrier in urban environments such as roadsides or medians.
description: A dark gray, concrete-like jersey barrier with a rough, weathered surface and metal-reinforced ends. It features base notches and no visible markings or reflective elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the barrier, rough surface texture, and base notches.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow, tapered profile and the vertical metal reinforcement strip with bolts.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the same rough surface and base notches.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the metal reinforcement strip and the barrier's thickness.
